messages.content: me and jordan broke up last weekend and i'm just kinda sad about it

I'm really sorry to hear that. Breakups are rough, especially when it's still so fresh - a week isn't very long at all.

Do you want to talk about it? Like, are you more in the "just feeling sad and need to process" phase, or the "want to figure out what happened" phase, or just... somewhere in the middle?
it was pretty mutual, nobody did anything terrible, we just wanted different things

Those can actually be some of the hardest ones in a way - like there's no villain, no clear reason to be angry, just... sadness. It's harder to know what to do with that sometimes.

How long were you two together?
still though, three years. i keep reaching for my phone to text them stuff and then remembering

Oh, that's such a specific kind of hurt. Three years is a long time - they were just *woven into your day*, you know? That reflex of wanting to share things with them doesn't just switch off overnight.

What kind of stuff do you keep wanting to text them about?
i had a little cry tonight watching one of our old shows. felt good actually, like letting it out

That's actually really healthy - letting yourself feel it rather than pushing it down. A good cry can be such a release.

And there's something kind of bittersweet about that, watching a show you shared together. It's sad but it's also like... honoring what was real and good about those three years, you know?

Are you doing okay otherwise though - like eating, sleeping, have people around you?
i'll be ok, i know i will. just gonna be a sad few weeks and that's normal i think

Yeah, that's exactly right. You seem to have a pretty healthy perspective on it - letting yourself feel it, not fighting it, knowing it'll pass. That's honestly the way through.

And three years deserves a sad few weeks. It would be weird if it *didn't* hurt.

Is there anything that's been helping, even a little?
